meme.title: This cat just appeared from the darkness of my garden. Please meme it

headlines.h: Weather Alert: Did medieval artists not know what cats looked like?
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-04-05)

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: The being from beyond
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
